title: Parkio Daily briefing for 2026-05-18
teaser: Star Wars missions launch Friday, Disney Magic departs Alaska, and Hollywood Studios preps three major openings this week.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Early morning wait times under 15 minutes

rides.name: Rise of the Resistance
rides.note: Queue drops mid-afternoon before new mission Friday

breaking.title: Disney Magic begins inaugural Alaska sailings
breaking.body: The Disney Magic departed Vancouver on May 16 for its first Alaska voyage after a two-week dry dock. The ship joins the Wonder for seven-night sailings this summer with new Frozen entertainment.

parkioInsight.text: Alaska cruise inventory tends to fill fast during peak summer months. If the new Magic sailings appeal, booking soon may offer better cabin selection and pricing before word spreads.

bignews.title: Mandalorian and Grogu mission lands on Smugglers Run Friday
bignews.body: Starting May 22, Millennium Falcon: Smugglers Run debuts a new storyline at both Walt Disney World and Disneyland featuring Din Djarin and Grogu chasing ex-Imperial officers across Tatooine, Bespin, or Coruscant. Engineers can now check on Grogu mid-flight and choose the mission's destination planet.

parkioInsight.text: Galaxy's Edge tends to see a surge of traffic when new Star Wars content drops. Riding Smugglers Run during early entry or late evening often avoids the midday rush when film fans flood the land.

bignews.title: Hollywood Studios stacks three major openings in one week
bignews.body: Between May 22 and May 25, the park launches The Mandalorian mission on Smugglers Run, opens Muppets Rockin' Sunset Coast, and debuts the Magic of Disney Animation experience. Each targets different park areas and guest demographics.

parkioInsight.text: Hollywood Studios crowds usually spike during multi-opening windows. Guests may find better touring flow by hitting one new experience at rope drop, then shifting to lower-traffic attractions after lunch.

topstories.title: New Mandalorian food and merch arrive at both resorts
topstories.body: Grogu Cookies, Sweet-and-Spicy Puffer Pig Pasta, jetpack sippers, and themed merchandise including figurine sets and apparel debuted this week at Galaxy's Edge locations in both Florida and California. A BDX Droid Bucket also launched with a two-per-guest limit.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition Star Wars merchandise tends to sell out within hours at flagship Galaxy's Edge shops. Stopping by Dok-Ondar's or Star Wars Galactic Outpost early in the day often improves selection before stock dwindles.

topstories.title: Soarin' Over California wraps at DCA ahead of Across America debut
topstories.body: The limited-time Soarin' Over California run ends soon at Disney California Adventure to prepare for Soarin' Across America's Independence Day weekend launch. No lengthy soft-opening window is expected before the switchover.

parkioInsight.text: Guests wanting one last ride on the original Soarin' Over California should visit DCA this week. Wait times may climb as the closing date nears and nostalgia drives demand.

topstories.title: EPCOT guests spot Max and Aydar streetmosphere acts at 2:15 PM
topstories.body: The Amazing Max and Aydar are performing garden-themed variety acts in World Celebration hourly from 9:15 AM through 2:15 PM during the Flower and Garden Festival. The show runs until June 1.

parkioInsight.text: Streetmosphere acts like Max and Aydar offer low-wait entertainment during peak afternoon heat. Catching a show around 2:15 PM can provide a shaded break while crowds queue elsewhere.

icymi.title: Voice actor recorded Hondo lines for Smugglers Run a year ago
icymi.body: Jim Cummings revealed he recorded Hondo Ohnaka's dialogue for the new Mandalorian mission about 12 months before the May 22 launch. He also rode the attraction multiple times to test his performance.

icymi.title: Target drops Fourth of July Stanley collection
icymi.body: Target quietly released a patriotic Stanley tumbler line perfect for summer theme park trips. The collection features red, white, and blue colorways ahead of Independence Day.

spotlight.title: The Curious Child projection show debuts at Disneyland Galaxy's Edge
spotlight.body: Starting May 16, Grogu appears nightly in a limited-time projection show called The Curious Child, playing after Shadows of Memory on the Batuu spires near the Millennium Falcon. The show celebrates the new film and runs through the end of May.

parkioInsight.text: Galaxy's Edge projection shows usually draw smaller crowds than castle shows. Arriving 10–15 minutes early near the Falcon often secures a good view without the hour-long stake-out required for fireworks.
